stemHtml: While programming the FMS, the flight crew enters the wrong cruising level. What are the possible consequences?

options.a: Speed, fuel burn, and time will not be updated.
options.b: The FMS predictions will give bad results to the flight crew.
options.c: The FMS will show a "DATA ERROR" message.
options.d: It is not possible to enter a new cruising flight level once in flight.
